summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical exists for this shard, no security-sensitive item was detected, and the job disables merge, fix PRs, low-signal closeout, and instant closeout; all open PRs should remain open with their specific blockers preserved for maintainer/author follow-up.

actions.reason: Independent useful contributor PR with proof/check blockers; keep open because this inventory job cannot merge, repair, or safely close it.
Independent feature PR with unresolved review-bot and mergeability blockers; keep open for author/maintainer follow-up.
Independent small cleanup PR that may be maintainer-reviewable, but this worker cannot merge and should not invent a shared canonical.
Independent focused bug fix with proof, rebase, and semantics-confirmation blockers; keep open rather than close or merge.
Independent UI behavior PR with proof, rebase, and maintainer-acceptance blockers; keep open for maintainer/author follow-up.
